channel.title: Supplements
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Supplements, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How Protein Quality Becomes More Important in Combating Age-Related Muscle Loss
item.description: Muscle mass declines gradually after age 30 and accelerates over time. Experts say the quality of dietary protein matters more as the body's ability to synthesize muscle decreases.

item.title: Animal M-Stak Reformulated for 2026 with Updated Ingredients
item.description: Animal has relaunched its non-hormonal muscle-building supplement for 2026, replacing several older botanical compounds with newer clinically studied ingredients.

item.title: Podcast Episode 214: Inside NuCelium's Functional Mushroom Cultivation Operation
item.description: The PricePlow Podcast features NuCelium co-founders discussing their functional mushroom cultivation company and their approach to quality and sourcing.

item.title: Gaspari Nutrition Updates SizeOn Formula with New Performance Ingredients
item.description: The long-running SizeOn supplement has been updated with Amino9, HMB, and 6 grams of creatine, reflecting changes in sports nutrition research since its original release.
